insights: The market underwent a significant structural shift around day 20, moving from a ~1000 job baseline to a ~1330 baseline, suggesting a seasonal hiring surge or a major influx of new graduate roles.
While FAANG+ hiring is currently trending downward, the overall market growth is being sustained by strong performance in mid-tier and unicorn-status companies.
The stability of the 7-day average (1355) against the 30-day average (1123) indicates that the recent jump in volume is likely a new floor rather than a temporary spike.
